caption:
A peek inside our consultation room—where every treatment plan begins.

At Rani, we don't have a "menu" approach to aesthetics. Every patient starts here: in a private consultation where we listen, assess, and plan.

What happens during your first consultation:

• A thorough skin analysis using clinical assessment tools
• Review of your medical history and current medications
• Discussion of your aesthetic goals—what you want to enhance, what you want to preserve
• Honest conversation about realistic outcomes and timelines
• A customized treatment plan with phased recommendations
• Full cost transparency before any commitment

We take our time. We don't rush. And we never pressure.

Because the right treatment plan starts with the right conversation.

No two faces are the same. No two treatment plans should be either.

Schedule your consultation at Rani. Link in bio.
mediaDescription: Warm, inviting photo of the consultation room—comfortable seating, soft lighting, clinical tools subtly visible. Overlay text cards describing each step of the consultation process. Intimate, welcoming atmosphere that communicates trust and professionalism.
